---
title: "Weekly-ish Updates"
subtitle: "Semi-Regular Wrap-Ups, Updates, Meeting Agendas, Musings on Mussels & Tidepool Tidbits"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
listing:
  contents: weekly
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

![](img/crabinhand.jpg){fig-align="center" width="400"}
